name: envi_nm_soft_ground
comment: ENVI VAL-03 scene (c): free-field geometry of scene (a) but over flat SOFT ground (G=1, absorbing), no barrier. Isolates flat-ground excess attenuation (Aground). REPORT-ONLY: ENVI's complex spherical-wave Q-hat interference (frequency dips) vs CNOSSOS's empirical octave-band G-model (no dips) are fundamentally different models - equality is NOT gated; only magnitude + trend are documented. Local projected CRS EPSG:2154 (metres). See ../README.md.
